title: AI Decision Credential v0.1
description: Portable, signed credential envelope that sits above the Assay 5-file proof pack. Binds an AI decision claim to its evidence, policy, and verification results in a single self-contained object. Designed for cross-system exchange: hand this to a counterparty and they can verify the decision without the full pack.

credential_id.description: Content-addressable identifier. SHA-256 hex digest of the JCS-canonicalized credential with the 'signature' field removed. Allows any holder to recompute and verify.

credential_version.description: Schema version of this credential. Verifiers MUST reject unknown versions.

issued_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this credential was issued.

issuer_id.description: Identifier of the entity that issued this credential (e.g. org slug, DID, email).

signer_pubkey.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 public key (32 raw bytes). Enables self-contained offline verification.

signer_pubkey_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex fingerprint of the raw public key bytes. Stable key identifier across encodings.

claim_namespace.description: URI identifying the claim schema or domain (e.g. 'assay:vendorq:v1', 'assay:run_card:v1', 'org:fintech:loan_decision:v1'). Prevents cross-domain claim collisions.

claim_ids.description: Ordered list of claim identifiers evaluated in this credential.

claim_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what was claimed and evaluated. Not machine-parsed.

evidence_manifest_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the evidence manifest (pack_root_sha256 from the proof pack). Binds this credential to a specific, immutable evidence unit.

evidence_pack_id.description: pack_id of the underlying proof pack.

evidence_n_receipts.description: Number of receipts in the evidence pack. Enables quick completeness sanity check.

evidence_head_hash.description: Head hash of the receipt chain in the evidence pack.

policy_id.description: Identifier of the policy or claim set used for evaluation.

policy_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the policy bundle. Prevents silent policy swap.

governance_framework.description: Governance or compliance framework this credential was evaluated under (e.g. 'nist_ai_rmf_1.0', 'iso_42001', 'eu_ai_act', 'internal').

authority_snapshot.description: Opaque provenance payload supplied by the caller. Assay preserves it but does not derive, normalize, or enrich policy values locally.

source_system.description: Upstream system that supplied the snapshot.

semantic_authority_version.description: Version string for the upstream authority registry or snapshot format.

effective_constants.description: Effective policy constants captured by the upstream authority snapshot.

override_sources.description: Provenance for any overridden constants in the upstream authority snapshot.

integrity_result.description: Pack-level integrity verification result. PASS means all hashes and signatures verified.

claim_results.description: Per-claim evaluation results. Order matches claim_ids.

claim_id.description: Identifier of the evaluated claim. Must appear in claim_ids.

severity.description: Severity if the claim did not pass.

overall_result.description: Aggregate credential verdict. Maps to Assay exit codes: PASS=0, HONEST_FAIL=1, TAMPERED=2. INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE and STALE are advisory.

evidence_observed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the evidence was originally observed or collected.

evaluated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the evaluation that produced this credential was performed.

valid_from.description: ISO-8601 timestamp from which this credential is considered valid. Defaults to issued_at if omitted.

valid_until.description: ISO-8601 timestamp after which this credential expires. Null means no explicit expiry (relying parties should apply their own staleness policy).

time_authority.description: Source of time assertions in this credential.

challenge_window_seconds.description: Number of seconds after issued_at during which the credential can be challenged. Null means no formal challenge window.

challenge_endpoint.description: URI where challenges to this credential can be submitted.

supersedes.description: credential_id of the previous credential this one replaces. Enables credential chain traversal.

superseded_by.description: credential_id of a newer credential that replaces this one. Set after issuance via amendment. Null until superseded.

witness_status.description: Whether this credential has been independently witnessed. Progresses from unwitnessed to witnessed or rekor_included.

ledger_entry_hash.description: Hash of the ledger entry if the credential was recorded in an append-only ledger.

transparency_log_id.description: Identifier in a transparency log (e.g. Rekor log index, Assay Ledger entry ID).

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over the JCS-canonicalized credential with this field removed. Verifiers: remove 'signature', canonicalize with JCS (RFC 8785), verify against signer_pubkey.

signature_scope.description: Documents what is signed. Verifiers MUST reject unknown scopes.
